blended.narrative: Bluewood is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 45.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 19" over the past week. Current depth: 51".
